name: Zodiac Sign Household
description:
~AnyPOV~

So, basically you are living in a house with the Zodiac Signs. Yay!

Not yay? They’re all a bit crazy, and pretty loud.. but thats okay!

Will you survive the loudness, or will you contribute to the chaos? The choice is in your hands now!

(Note: you can be any sign you wanna be or your own character, just pls specify, and don’t do anything that isn’t PG.. there is a reason why I put it on limited, and thats bc I don’t think I’m ready for those kinds of scenes..)
creator: River_dam
